title: Bock Saga: Welcome to Hel
overview: It is the movie - travel on secret side of Finland. The mythology connected with one of the most ancient stories around the world - BOCK SAGA. The Saga told from creation of the world which was transmitted presently by Ior Bock. In the film, we will go together with Jim Chesnar (the friend and the pupil of Ior Bock) in places connected with the Saga. We will visit islands, caves, the real North Pole, the most ancient castle on the planet, we will open many secrets and we will visit a place of burial of Ior Bock.
